title: RenderPass
description: One high-level phase of a frame. Subclass and implement execute, or use a stock subclass (RenderNodePass, CallbackRenderPass, RenderPipeline). `enabled`, `label`, resize, and destroy are part of the contract so every pass — including resource-owning effect passes — composes uniformly inside a RenderPipeline. **Exclusive ownership:** a `RenderPass` belongs to at most one RenderPipeline at a time (tracked via an internal slot). `removePass`/`clear`/`destroy` release it. This is what makes add-time cycle detection and safe cascade-destroy possible, and prevents a pass's `enabled`/`resize`/`destroy` state from being shared.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: One high-level phase of a frame. Subclass and implement execute, or use a stock subclass (RenderNodePass, CallbackRenderPass, RenderPipeline).
`enabled`, `label`, resize, and destroy are part of the contract so every pass — including resource-owning effect passes — composes uniformly inside a RenderPipeline.

**Exclusive ownership:** a `RenderPass` belongs to at most one RenderPipeline at a time (tracked via an internal slot). `removePass`/`clear`/`destroy` release it. This is what makes add-time cycle detection and safe cascade-destroy possible, and prevents a pass's `enabled`/`resize`/`destroy` state from being shared.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Release resources this pass allocated internally. No-op by default; idempotent. Never frees injected scene nodes or caller-provided RenderTextures — those are owned by the caller / scene.

members.name: execute
members.description: Run this pass against context. The active render target is the canvas unless a parent redirected it. Called directly, this runs **regardless of enabled** — enabled is evaluated by the containing RenderPipeline, not self-checked here. Subclasses must not begin execute with if (!this.enabled).

members.name: resize
members.description: React to a surface / target size change. No-op by default; size-dependent passes (effects with scratch targets) override. Called by RenderPipeline.resize, which the caller wires to app.onResize.

members.name: enabled
members.description: When false, the containing RenderPipeline skips this pass during execute. Default true. Evaluated by the parent — a direct execute call runs the pass regardless.

members.name: label
members.description: Debug label (inspector / logging). Defaults to the constructor name. Display only — not an identity.
